settings.ocrServiceDesc: See the documentation for more details:
settings.commandDesc: Shell command to execute (desktop-only, Tesseract will be used instead on mobile), using {input} and {output} for the file paths
settings.openAiCompatibleApiKeyDesc: Usually only required for cloud services
settings.openAiCompatiblePromptDesc: Override the default instructions sent to the model
settings.convertPdfsDesc: Convert PDF pages to PNG images before processing
settings.useEmbeddedTextDesc: When a PDF already contains embedded text, use it instead of extracting with OCR
settings.autoExtractAttachmentsDesc: Automatically extract text when a new attachment is added to a note

installerUpdate.title: Installer update required
installerUpdate.body: OCR Extractor requires a newer Obsidian installer version to work correctly. Please download and install the latest Obsidian (you do not need to uninstall first).

extractAll.title: Extract text from all notes?
extractAll.warning: Make sure you have a backup of your vault before extracting text from attachments in all notes.

status.title: Extracting text from attachments...
status.warning_one: Text extracted from {{count}} attachment. The following were skipped:
status.warning_other: Text extracted from {{count}} attachments. The following were skipped:

notices.autoExtractSkippedWhileBusy: {{pluginName}}: Extraction already in progress, new attachment skipped
notices.mobileServiceFallback: {{pluginName}}: Custom commands are not available on mobile, using Tesseract
notices.mobileServiceFallbackSetting: {{pluginName}}: Custom commands are not available on mobile, Tesseract will be used instead
notices.modelsLoadFailed: Couldn't load models. Check the base URL and server status.
notices.testNoOutput: Command succeeded but no output file produced

errors.serverError: The server returned an error (HTTP {{status}}). Try again later.
errors.extractionFailed: Failed to extract text. Check the developer console for details.
errors.openAiCompatibleNotFound: Model or endpoint not found. Check the base URL and model name.
errors.openAiCompatibleConnectionFailed: Could not connect to the server. Check the base URL and server status.
errors.openAiCompatibleResponseTruncated: The model's response was cut short. Try a different model.
errors.openAiCompatibleRequestFailed: Request failed (HTTP {{status}}). See the developer console for details.
errors.commandFailed: Custom command failed (exit code {{code}}). Check the developer console for details.
